name: docs-cockpit
description: Project dashboard (Kanban + Sprint + KPI) + tree-sidebar markdown browser in self-contained HTML files. Bilingual EN/中 toggle. Frontmatter-driven with auto body extraction. Ships 3 auto-triggered skills + 6 slash commands including `/docs-cockpit:upgrade` — gstack-inspired one-command CLI+plugin upgrade with atomic cache-clear + restart (no more ghost state).
